title: Immersive Foods
description: Official Port of Immersive Food by HedgeHogPie! Reworked and New Foods!
body:
Immersive Foods is a ported mod from HedgeHogPies, the original.

Its goal was to build on the vanilla food structure without over-complicating what it can do. All I added was food drop equivalents to what I felt was normal...and maybe...  some interesting ones. 

This mod is very close to vanilla in some way as it adds vanilla-like foods, and currently includes:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


 Original Versions and up:

- Squid
- Llama
- Horse
- Mule       
- Wolf        
- Ocelot    
- Dragon   
- Bat           
- Bat Wing          
- Potato Soup
- Carrot Soup

1.12.2 and up:

- Parrot   

1.18.2 and up:

- Goat
- Turtle
- Dolphin
- Cat....
- Axolotl
- Bee
- Fox

1.19.3 and up!

- Frog Legs

1.20 and Up!

- Sniffer + Leather
- Camel + Leather

1.21.1

- Armadillo

26.1.2

- Nautilus


</details>
